settings.heading: Compare Remote Business Partner membership options before joining
settings.text: Use this page for plan details, inclusions, application context and support routing before choosing a membership option.

settings.heading: Pricing, inclusions and next steps should be clear before signup
settings.text: Membership options should explain what is included, what requires eligibility or application review, and how to ask for help before joining.

settings.title: Premium Membership
settings.text: Review the current membership offer, inclusions and application pathway before joining.

settings.title: Resources and support pathways
settings.text: Understand the practical resources, member pathways and support routes connected to membership.

settings.title: Eligibility and conditions
settings.text: Confirm any timing, application, offer or availability conditions before committing.

settings.title: Support before signup
settings.text: Contact support if the plan, business fit, onboarding step or offer details are unclear.

settings.heading: Review, compare, apply and use the member pathways
settings.text: Keep the purchase path practical by confirming fit and support needs before joining.

settings.title: Review the offer
settings.text: Read the membership option, price, inclusions, conditions and timing.

settings.title: Compare the fit
settings.text: Check whether the plan matches your need for resources, support, offers or ongoing business access.

settings.title: Apply or contact support
settings.text: Complete the signup route when ready or contact support if the fit is unclear.

settings.title: Use the pathways
settings.text: Once active, use RBP resources, services, marketplace context and support as business needs change.

settings.heading: Membership context and support
settings.text: Use these destinations to compare the overview, ask for help or explore the resource pathways membership connects to.

settings.title: Membership overview
settings.text: Understand the role of membership across RBP pathways.

settings.title: Essentials
settings.text: Browse templates, toolkits and supported resource options.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.text: Ask for help before signup when the plan or next step is unclear.

settings.heading: Membership option questions
settings.text: These questions help set expectations before signup or enquiry.

settings.question: Where should pricing and offer details live?
settings.answer: Pricing, current offers, application conditions and inclusions belong on this membership options page so the overview page can stay focused on value and fit.

settings.question: What if I am not sure membership is right for my business?
settings.answer: Contact support before joining and include your business context, what you need access to, and any deadline or onboarding question.

settings.question: Does membership replace RBP services?
settings.answer: No. Membership can connect you to resources, support and relevant pathways, but advisory, consulting, implementation or managed services may still be separate where scoped support is required.

settings.heading: Ready to compare or ask a question?
settings.text: Review the current membership offer details, then contact support if the next step is not clear.
